title: 2026 Cross-Border New Leafless Hanging Neck Fan USB Charging Portable Lazy Digital Display Sports Foldableing Mini Electric Fan
companyName: Third gear does not display white (1200 mA battery)
description: Stay cool and hands-free with this stylish, high-tech Portable Bladeless Neck Fan. Featuring a sleek white body with gold-accented controls, it offers 3-gear adjustable wind speeds to suit your comfort level. The smart circular LED digital display keeps you updated on the exact battery percentage in real-time. Engineered with safe, internal turbine bladeless technology, it ensures 100% safety for long hair and clothing, making it the perfect personal cooling companion for daily commutes, outdoor activities, or kitchen work.
Highlights:
• Safe & innovative bladeless turbine technology
• Smart LED digital display for real-time battery monitoring
• 3-gear adjustable wind speed control
• Built-in 1200mAh rechargeable battery with Type-C charging
• Lightweight, ergonomic, and fashionable hands-free design

title: Mosquito Killer Lamp USB Home Plug-In Rechargeable Portable Outdoor Dormitory Camping Mosquito Repellent Device Electric Mosquito Lamp Indoor Cross-Border
description: Protect your home and loved ones from annoying mosquitoes and insects with this advanced Electric Mosquito Killer Lamp. Utilizing a safe and highly effective UV light wavelength, it attracts mosquitoes and instantly eliminates them upon contact. This portable, low-noise device can be powered via standard USB plug-in or rechargeable battery, making it perfect for indoor use in your bedroom, living room, or student dormitory, as well as outdoor adventures like camping and backyard gatherings. Safe for kids and pets, it provides chemical-free, eco-friendly protection all night long.
Highlights:
• Advanced UV light technology to effectively attract and trap mosquitoes
• Safe, non-toxic, and chemical-free operation (100% pet & child safe)
• Highly portable with USB plug-in and rechargeable battery support
• Ultra-quiet operation ensures a peaceful and undisturbed sleep
• Perfect for indoor home use, dormitories, and outdoor camping trips

title: E88 Pro Quadcopter Drone – Dual HD Camera WiFi FPV Foldable Drone with Carrying Case (Grey)
description: Experience the thrill of flying with the E88 Pro Dual Camera Foldable Drone. This lightweight and portable quadcopter features dual high-definition cameras that support real-time WiFi FPV transmission, letting you capture stunning aerial photos and videos directly from your smartphone. Designed for both beginners and hobbyists, it includes advanced functions like one-key take-off/landing, altitude hold for stable hovering, and headless mode for effortless control. It comes in a sleek grey finish and includes a premium dedicated storage box to protect your drone and accessories on the go.
Highlights:
• Dual HD camera setup for versatile aerial photography and video
• Real-time WiFi FPV transmission to view live footage via smartphone
• Altitude hold and optical flow positioning for stable, steady flight
• Compact, foldable design with a premium storage box/carrying case
• Easy operation with one-key takeoff, landing, and headless mode

title: ChromaBeam – RGB Corner Floor Lamp with Smart App Control
description: Transform your room's atmosphere instantly with this smart RGB corner floor lamp. Designed to fit perfectly in unused corners, it projects stunning, vibrant ambient lighting onto your walls. With millions of color options, dynamic lighting effects, and a music-sync mode, you can control the entire vibe via a smartphone app or remote control, making it perfect for movie nights, gaming, or relaxing setups.
Highlights:
• Smart RGB lighting with app control
• Perfect for unused corners
• Dynamic lighting effects
• Music-sync mode

title: BohoTread – Handwoven Bohemian Area Rug for Cozy Interiors
description: Bring comfort and artistic texture underfoot with this beautifully handwoven bohemian area rug. Featuring intricate geometric patterns, neutral color tones, and classic fringe tassels, it adds a cozy, relaxed vibe to bedrooms, living spaces, or reading nooks. Made from durable, eco-friendly cotton fibers, it holds up perfectly to daily use while enhancing your home's aesthetic appeal.
Highlights:
• Handwoven bohemian design
• Intricate geometric patterns
• Neutral color tones
• Classic fringe tassels

title: ClayArt – Handcrafted Ceramic Flower Vase for Pampas Grass
description: Elevate your tabletop decor with this minimalist ceramic flower vase. Its sturdy ceramic base provides excellent stability on any shelf, desk, mantel, or dining table.
Highlights:

• Unique organic silhouette

• Sturdy ceramic base

title: VividWall – Premium Abstract Canvas Wall Art Frame
description: Turn blank walls into a home gallery with this premium abstract canvas wall art. Printed with high-quality, fade-resistant archival inks, it boasts vivid color depth and striking visual textures. Set inside a sturdy, lightweight wood frame, it comes ready to hang and immediately serves as an artistic focal point over your living room sofa, bed, or office workspace.

• High-quality, fade-resistant archival inks

title: ThroneMax – Ergonomic Gaming Chair with Lumbar Support
description: Experience ultimate comfort during intense gaming sessions or long hours of remote work with this ergonomic gaming chair. Featuring high-density foam padding, adjustable armrests, and full lumbar and neck support, it encourages excellent sitting posture. title: DeskNeat – Multi-Functional Desktop Organizer Storage Rack

Its space-saving design ensures a clean and inspiring productivity setup.
Highlights:

title: ChronoDigit – Digital Smart Wall Clock with Temperature Display
description: Stay on schedule with style using this futuristic digital smart wall clock. Featuring a bright, easy-to-read LED display, it clearly shows the time, date, day, and current room temperature. Equipped with an ambient light sensor, it automatically adjusts brightness to prevent eye strain at night, making it ideal for bedrooms and modern living room walls.
Highlights:

title: OasisMist – Ultrasonic Aroma Essential Oil Diffuser with Cool Mist

• Ultrasonic technology for gentle misting
